headline: Garmin receives Best Supplier of the Year Award for 11th straight year from Embraer
summary: Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced it received a Best Supplier of the Year Award for the 11th consecutive year from Embraer during the annual Embraer Suppliers Conference (ESC), held April 14–15 in São José dos Campos, Brazil. Embraer recognized Garmin in the Electrical and Electronic Systems category, reinforcing Garmin's long-standing commitment to quality, innovation and customer support for its G3000® Prodigy Touch flight deck systems in the Phenom 100EV and Phenom 300E.
